color.feature.privacy.title: 100% Private
color.feature.privacy.desc: All processing happens in your browser. No files uploaded. Your data stays on your device.
color.feature.speed.title: Lightning Fast
color.feature.speed.desc: Powered by Canvas APIs for instant color processing. No waiting, no loading.
color.feature.free.title: Completely Free
color.feature.free.desc: All 12 tools free with no limits. No sign-up. No watermarks. No premium locks.
color.faq.q1: Are my files uploaded to a server?
color.faq.a1: Never. All operations run in your browser. No data leaves your device.
color.faq.a2: HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, CMYK, LAB, LCH, OKLCH, HWB, and XYZ with instant conversion.
color.faq.q3: What is the APCA contrast algorithm?
color.faq.a3: APCA is the next-gen contrast standard for WCAG 3.0 with more accurate readability predictions.
color.faq.q4: Can I export palettes for Figma or Tailwind?
color.faq.a4: Yes! CSS, SCSS, Tailwind config, JSON, ASE, GPL, PNG, and SVG export formats.
color.faq.q5: How does the palette generator work?
color.faq.a5: Press spacebar for harmonious palettes. Lock favorites and keep generating.
